case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF VS. JAMMAL EDWARDS

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $60.50) SERVED AUG-18-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARDS, JAMMAL
